blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,756 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 10.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 30".
